perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a grey translucent top stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a large packaged smoked salmon salad. She examines the salad closely and speaks to the camera. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor dining area where the woman is joined by another woman wearing a black-and-white patterned bucket hat. They sit at a table with the salad open. (3) Detailed close-ups show the salad ingredients, specifically the salmon slices rolled into rose shapes, mozzarella cheese balls, and cherry tomatoes. The women use tongs to lift a piece of salmon to show its thickness and texture while reacting enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic music begins. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone, describing the visual appeal of the smoked salmon roses in the salad. Background warehouse noise is faint. (2) Two female voices engage in a lively conversation as the music continues. They discuss the salad's contents, the specific wasabi-flavored dressing, and the price point. Sounds of plastic packaging and metal tongs clicking are heard. (3) The commentary becomes more enthusiastic, with both women praising the taste and value. The background music remains consistent in its high-energy tempo until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo; '不浪費年費' (Don't waste the annual fee); '燻鮭魚乳酪沙拉' (Smoked Salmon Cheese Salad). Decorative/Hook: '哇好漂亮' (Wow, so beautiful!) in a bright pink font. (2) Functional Text: '372元' (indicating the price); '山葵沙拉醬' (Wasabi salad dressing). (3) Decorative/Hook: '燻鮭魚沙拉' in large red characters; '有夠好吃' (So delicious!) with a fiery background effect; '超讚' (Super great!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook in store -> Detailed tasting and review at home -> Final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators, approximately 6 shoppers in the background at the store.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with a black beret and a grey top; another woman with a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A busy Costco shopping aisle with refrigerated shelves; a clean home kitchen/dining area with a marble-patterned table.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Feature Breakdown -> Tasting Experience -> Value Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and recommend the Costco smoked salmon salad. The video highlights the aesthetic 'rose' arrangement of the fish, the generous portions of cheese and vegetables, the unique flavor of the wasabi dressing, and the overall cost-effectiveness of the product to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of a specific product with clear pricing and brand visibility.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style editing with large emotional captions and quick cuts between the store and home settings.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a typical 'Must-buy at Costco' trend popular on social media, using visual proof of quality to build trust with the audience.
